title: AI-RESONANCE-DATING-APP — Concept Origin Seal
entry: AI Resonance Dating App concept originated March 10, 2026. Core concept: week-long AI conversation as intake process before any match is made. Psychological profiling through natural dialogue not questionnaires. RESONANCE framework as pairing algorithm. Narcissism and attachment pattern detection built into intake. No swipe mechanic. Match only after AI has sufficient conversational data to assess compatibility architecture. Author: Sheldon K. Salmon.
subject: AI-powered dating platform — conversational psychological profiling as primary matching mechanism
author: Sheldon K. Salmon
